name: Maya Chen
quote: One of the most thoughtful engineers we've worked with. Ships fast, but the architecture is always sound — we didn't have to revisit decisions later.

name: Daniel Roy
quote: Took a half-baked spec and turned it into a production-grade analytics pipeline. Strong ownership, strong instincts, and great taste in UI.

name: Priya Shah
quote: Our checkout conversion is up 18% and the codebase is finally something the next dev can actually read. Genuinely top-tier work.
